array.string: export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin export HOME=/Users/nicholasfleischhauer LOG=/tmp/priority-forge-watchdog.log echo "[$(date)] Watchdog started" >> $LOG while true; do # Check backend if ! curl -s --connect-timeout 2 http://127.0.0.1:3456/version > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "[$(date)] Backend down - restarting" >> $LOG launchctl kickstart -k gui/$(id -u)/com.priority-forge.backend 2>/dev/null fi # Check frontend if ! curl -s --connect-timeout 2 http://127.0.0.1:5173 > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "[$(date)] Frontend down - restarting" >> $LOG launchctl kickstart -k gui/$(id -u)/com.priority-forge.frontend 2>/dev/null fi sleep 30 done
